name: tallymind-mcp-plugin
description: MCP plugin connecting TallyPrime to Claude via its HTTP/XML gateway, with diagnostics, GST tools, guarded writes, and client document → voucher import.

interface.shortDescription: Talk to TallyPrime in plain English from Claude.
interface.longDescription: Connects Claude to a local TallyPrime instance over its HTTP/XML gateway: connection diagnostics, ledgers/vouchers/reports/GST summaries with fuzzy name search, guarded preview-then-confirm writes, and a document-import skill that turns a client's invoices, bills, bank statements, and receipts into GST-correct Tally vouchers for review before posting.
defaultPrompt: Using TallyMind, run tally_doctor and tell me if I'm connected.
Which clients have GST mismatches this quarter?
Show me overdue debtors past 90 days.
Process this client's document folder into Tally vouchers for review.
